top_signals.title: Indonesia Gets First Russian Oil Shipment After Deal with Moscow
top_signals.summary: Indonesia imported Russian crude oil for the first time since a deal struck between the two nations in April, a sign of how Moscow has taken advantage of the Iran conflict to grow its customers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Market Warns UK’s Plan for Long-Dated Debt Needs a Rethink
top_signals.summary: Investors say that another bout of political uncertainty will force the UK to scale back planned sales of long-dated debt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
top_signals.summary: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong's Mideast pivot and China's AI persona woes
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix US Offering Is More Than Seven Times Oversubscribed
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, underscoring strong investor appetite despite recent volatility in the Korean memory chipmaker’s shares.

top_signals.title: Fixing the £100,000 tax trap would be a bold first step – let’s not undermine it by taxing investment more
top_signals.summary: Lord O’Neill is right to call for reform of the £100,000 tax trap, but taxing capital gains more heavily could end up costing the Treasury £8bn, says Michael Healy This week, a group of leading economists led by Lord O’Neill called for a fundamental overhaul of the UK’s tax system. top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary:

top_signals.title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
top_signals.summary: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.
